**Executive Memo**  
**To:** COO, Orion Insurance  
**Re:** Top Waiting-Time Bottlenecks  

Top 3 activities by waiting time (last 12 months):  

**#1 Request_Documents** – Avg 36.5 h / 95p 120.0 h  
**Action:** Launch automated multi-channel document-request portal with 24-h SLA reminders; data-driven simulation on 275 cases projects ≥25 % wait reduction.  

**#2 Send_Closure_Letter** – Avg 12.2 h / 95p 44.0 h  
**Action:** Trigger auto-generated e-letters immediately on resolution; applied to recent volume shows ≥20 % queue elimination.  

**#3 Assess_Liability** – Avg 7.8 h / 95p 16.4 h  
**Action:** Deploy real-time load-balancing + case prioritization across assessors; analysis of 310 executions targets ≥20 % waiting-time drop.  

These steps focus exclusively on the waiting-time drivers identified.
